items.title: Kelsey Plum, who has not played in exactly one month, is OUT for tomorrow’s game. Plum’s re-evaluation date is coming up in a few days. Plum, who Sparks coach Lynne Roberts described as dealing with a “soft tissue injury,” is in the “build up stage” in her rehabilitation process.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Kelsey Plum, who has not played in exactly one month, is OUT for tomorrow’s game. Plum’s re-evaluation date is coming up in a few days. items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Mike Brown. George Washington PF/C was drafted 69th in 85 by CHI. After a year in Italy & 2 in CHI, spent 88-93 in UTA backing up Karl Malone. Peaked at 7.7 ppg in 91-92. Also played w/MIN, PHI & PHO thru 97. Per bio: "he'd be 7-footer if he had a neck."
